subheadline: Three habits shape every release, from the first atom sketch to the seeded styleguide.

items.title: Open source by default
items.description: Everything ships GPL-2.0 on GitHub — components, presets, and the seeder. Issues and pull requests drive the roadmap.

image.title: Team workshop
image.alternative: Colleagues discussing work around a shared table.

items.title: Audit before merge
items.description: An 11-category template audit with zero tolerance: no inline styles, no hardcoded colors, every element checked in CI.

image.title: Studio office
image.alternative: A bright office space with desks and screens.
image.description: Office photo from Unsplash by E. Vos.

items.title: Editors are users too
items.description: All 244 content elements get a real backend preview, so TYPO3 editors see what they ship — not gray placeholder boxes.

image.title: Whiteboard session
image.alternative: Two people sketching interface ideas on a whiteboard.
image.description: Collaboration photo from Unsplash by Vitaly Gariev.
